task_completion.description: Open the initial three-stage rocket design in OpenRocket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket GUI is visible, showing 'three_stage_source' in the title bar or the component tree with three distinct stages.

task_completion.description: Modify the rocket design to have exactly two stages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The component tree in OpenRocket displays exactly two stages (e.g., Sustainer and one Booster stage) instead of the original three.

task_completion.description: Ensure the two-stage design includes a nose cone, fins, a recovery device with deployment, and assigned motors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The component tree shows a Nose Cone, at least one set of Fins, and a Parachute/Streamer. The motor configuration tab shows motors assigned to the remaining stages.

task_completion.description: Run a flight simulation to verify the modified design.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket is open and shows a completed simulation run with results (apogee, velocity) for the two-stage configuration.

task_completion.description: Save the modified two-stage rocket design to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager/terminal showing 'two_stage_simplified.ork' being saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/' directory.

task_completion.description: Provide a design modification report documenting the removed stage, configuration summary, predicted performance, and stability margin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing the contents of 'stage_reduction_report.txt' at '/home/ga/Documents/exports/', containing mentions of the removed stage, apogee, velocity, and stability margin.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the rocket and run simulations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenRocket application interface (component tree, simulation tabs) rather than directly editing XML files or using a script.

integrity.description: The performance metrics in the report match the actual simulation results from OpenRocket.
integrity.visual_evidence: The apogee, velocity, and stability margin values written in the text report match the numbers visible in the OpenRocket 'Flight simulations' tab.

integrity.description: The agent ran the simulation before writing the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is visual proof of the simulation running in OpenRocket before the report file is finalized, ensuring values were not guessed or hardcoded.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source file is '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/three_stage_source.ork'. The target file must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/two_stage_simplified.ork' and contain exactly 2 stages. The report must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/stage_reduction_report.txt' and include apogee, velocity, stability margin, and details of the stage reduction.
